last_commit_subject: ci: bump Node 18.x (EOL) to 20.x LTS + fix npm cache path

frontend.router: Next.js App Router (app/) and Pages Router (pages-2/) coexisting

blockchain.framework: Cosmos SDK v0.47.3 + CometBFT v0.38.21 + cosmjs clients
blockchain.note: Sixth Go service in the org; leverages cosmjs/stargate on the JS side

provider.framework: FastAPI 0.95+ + uvicorn + pydantic + typer + rich CLI (Python)
provider.scope: GPU provider agent for the marketplace

docs.format: Markdown (README.md, TEST-README.md, CHANGELOG.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, SECURITY.md, .agileplus/specs)

language_stack.stack_mismatch_with_dag: DAG L1-14 description says 'vue+fastapi, local SQLite' — actual repo is Next.js (React) + Express (Node) + Go (Cosmos SDK) + Python (FastAPI in provider only). No .vue files. No .sqlite files. Frontend is React, not Vue; API is Express, not FastAPI; DB is Supabase Postgres, not SQLite. The only FastAPI surface is localbase-provider/api_server.py (GPU provider agent).

evidence: README.md (3045B) — covers project structure, prereqs, install, run, test, deploy, license
CHANGELOG.md exists (100B) but only contains the heading + 'All notable changes...' boilerplate + '## [Unreleased]' — no released versions, no Keep-a-Changelog format
missing at root — needed for the 4-language polyglot layout (TS/JS/Go/Python)

.github/workflows/test.yml (unit + e2e + accessibility + performance + load); .github/workflows/trufflehog.yml (secret scan); covers Next.js frontend + Express API only — no Go chain job, no Python provider job
.github/dependabot.yml — ecosystems: github-actions + cargo (weekly). MISSING: npm (frontend + api), pip (provider), gomod (chain). 4 of 6 ecosystems absent despite 4 active package manifests
missing — README has a 4-step 'Contributing' subsection but no CONTRIBUTING.md, no PR template, no issue templates
SECURITY.md (510B) — supported-versions table, kooshapari@gmail.com contact, 48h SLA, vulnerability disclosure checklist

candidates.use_case: Replace ad-hoc Express+JS event channels and Python provider job events with a single bus contract (localbase-api/server.js:1 + localbase-provider/job_processor.py)
Add correlation IDs across Express middleware (localbase-api/src/middleware/) → cosmpy client → Python provider — currently absent in any of the four runtimes
Replace @supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs + @supabase/auth-ui-react with a TypeScript-native auth layer (Next.js 15 app/ uses supabase-js directly: app/actions/api-keys.ts, app/actions/jobs.ts)
Adopt for the localbase-chain Go module (Go 1.24.0) — currently hand-rolled types in x/ modules; SDK scaffolds a Cosmos-compatible client
Adopt for localbase-provider (FastAPI + pydantic + cosmpy) — Python provider duplicates request/response schemas across api_server.py + api.py

Consolidate provider registry (localbase-provider/provider.py), API key registry (localbase-api/src/models/), and Supabase table registry (localbase-frontend/supabase/) under one schema-registry contract
Centralize the missing 4 dependabot ecosystems (npm, pip, gomod, github-actions) under the org dep-guard policy — current .github/dependabot.yml is hand-maintained and incomplete

Express error handler (localbase-api/src/app.js) + Go panic recovery (localbase-chain/x/) + Python FastAPI exception handlers (localbase-provider/api_server.py) all re-implement error envelopes — should consume a shared error taxonomy
Express helmet + cors + rate-limit + body-parser middleware chain could be hosted by a shared postfx-style runner to match the rest of the Pheno org

Cypress e2e journeys (localbase-frontend/cypress/e2e/) + k6 load tests (localbase-api/load-tests/) + Go integration tests (localbase-chain/x/) could emit journey traces via phenotype-journeys instead of running in isolation
Dockerfile / docker-compose infra (implied by README 'Docker for local development') is not in repo — vendor a base image / compose layer from phenotype-infra

sota_gaps: DAG description drift: FLEET_100TASK_DAG_v2.md says 'localbase3 — audit (vue+fastapi, local SQLite)' but the repo is actually Next.js (React) + Express (Node) + Go (Cosmos SDK) + Python (FastAPI in provider). Zero .vue files, zero .sqlite files, zero FastAPI routes in localbase-api/. The DAG entry needs correction (line 90 of FLEET_100TASK_DAG_v2.md also references 'pheno-fastapi-base + pheno-zod-schemas + pheno-pydantic-models' for a repo that has no FastAPI surface outside the provider).

CI is JS-only: .github/workflows/test.yml has no jobs for the Go Cosmos SDK chain or the Python FastAPI provider. localbase-chain/go.mod and localbase-provider/requirements.txt are not built, vetted, or tested in CI.

Dependabot covers 2 of 6 ecosystems: only github-actions + cargo. The two largest package surfaces — npm (Next.js 15.5.15 + Express 4) and pip (FastAPI 0.95+, torch 2.0+, transformers 4.28+) — are unmonitored for upstream CVEs.

No observability / tracing: Express has no OTel, no request-ID middleware, no structured logger; Go chain has cosmos-sdk's default logging only; Python provider has no OpenTelemetry instrumentation. PhenoObservability not adopted.

No schema validation: API request/response shapes are inferred from Express route handlers + Supabase types. localbase-frontend has zustand stores but no zod schemas; localbase-provider has pydantic but does not export JSON-Schema to the frontend.

Two parallel frontend routers: app/ (App Router, 11 files) and pages-2/ (Pages Router, 2 files) coexist with no clear migration plan. pages-2/index.tsx and pages-2/marketplace.tsx look like leftover/experimental surfaces.

Auth sprawl: three different Supabase client packages (@supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs, @supabase/auth-helpers-react, @supabase/auth-ui-react, @supabase/supabase-js) pinned, with conflicting minor versions. No JWT refresh-token rotation policy in code.
No retry/circuit-breaker on cosmpy or cosmjs clients: API server (server.js) and frontend (lib/) call Cosmos chain endpoints directly; transient RPC failures are surfaced to the user.
No rate-limit telemetry: express-rate-limit is configured but logs are unstructured; no Prometheus/OTel metrics for 429s or per-route latency.
No e2e for blockchain: localbase-chain has no docker-compose harness; integration tests in localbase-tests/ exist but no CI job runs them against a real chain.

No security scanning beyond trufflehog: no CodeQL, no govulncheck, no cargo-audit, no pip-audit, no Bandit/Safety. Express+helmet+jsonwebtoken stack is well-known to have CVEs in the JWT library family.
No i18n / l10n: en-only copy across all four runtimes despite provider/README hinting at a global GPU marketplace.
No accessibility design system: cypress-axe runs in CI but the headlessui + heroicons + tailwind stack is not wrapped in a reusable a11y-tested component library.
No provenance / SBOM: no SLSA, no sigstore, no npm publish provenance, no Go module checksum verification step.
Provider ML stack is unpinned at the major: transformers >=4.28, torch >=2.0 — both have had breaking API changes within their 4.x / 2.x lines. A reproducible build requires exact pins.
convergence_rationale: Four-language polyglot monorepo: TypeScript (Next.js frontend), JavaScript (Express API), Go (Cosmos SDK blockchain, Go 1.24), Python (FastAPI provider with ML stack). Plus SQL (Supabase schema.sql), shell (run-*.sh test runners), and TOML (Cargo manifest for the chain's tooling, plus cosmos-sdk's transitive go.mod). Touches 4 primary runtimes + 1 docs surface = multi-stack. Note: DAG-tagged 'vue+fastapi' is incorrect (no Vue, FastAPI only in the provider sub-crate, DB is Supabase Postgres not SQLite).

action_items.title: Correct the DAG L1-14 description in FLEET_100TASK_DAG_v2.md and align adoption plan to actual stack
action_items.details: Replace 'vue+fastapi, local SQLite' with 'Next.js (React) + Express + Cosmos SDK (Go) + Python FastAPI provider + Supabase Postgres'. Update line-90 adoption list from 'pheno-fastapi-base + pheno-zod-schemas + pheno-pydantic-models' to match the real surfaces (pheno-fastapi-base is irrelevant — only the provider has FastAPI; the API is Express). This is the highest-leverage 30-minute fix because every subsequent task in the DAG for this repo assumes the wrong stack.

action_items.title: Add CI jobs for the Go chain and the Python provider
action_items.details: Extend .github/workflows/test.yml with two new jobs: (a) localbase-chain: ubuntu-latest + actions/setup-go@v6 with go.mod cache, run `go build ./...` + `go test ./...` + `govulncheck ./...`; (b) localbase-provider: ubuntu-latest + actions/setup-python@v6 with pip cache, run `pip install -r requirements.txt` + `pytest` + `pip-audit`. Closes the 'CI is JS-only' SOTA gap and unblocks dependabot ecosystems for the missing runtimes.

action_items.title: Fill dependabot ecosystems (npm, pip, gomod) and add CodeQL + govulncheck
action_items.details: Extend .github/dependabot.yml to cover: npm in /localbase-frontend + /localbase-api (weekly, grouped), pip in /localbase-provider (weekly, grouped), gomod in /localbase-chain (weekly, grouped). Add .github/workflows/codeql.yml (javascript + python) and a govulncheck job inside the new localbase-chain CI job from action #2. Brings the repo from 2/6 ecosystems to 6/6 and unblocks CVE detection for the two largest dependency surfaces.

action_items.title: Wire request-id propagation + OTel across all four runtimes via phenotype-request-id + phenotype-bus
action_items.details: Add correlation-ID middleware in Express (localbase-api/src/middleware/), FastAPI dependency in provider (api_server.py), and a cosmos-sdk AnteHandler in Go chain (x/). Propagate the ID from the Next.js request → Express API → cosmpy RPC → Python provider. Adopt phenotype-bus for cross-runtime job events (replacing the ad-hoc Supabase Realtime channels in localbase-frontend/supabase/). Closes the 'no observability/tracing' SOTA gap and matches the PhenoObservability adoption pattern used in PhenoAgent/PhenoMCP.

action_items.title: Add missing hygiene files (.editorconfig, CONTRIBUTING.md) and harden CHANGELOG.md
action_items.details: Create a polyglot .editorconfig (TS/JS/Go/Python/MD/YAML sections) at repo root. Author CONTRIBUTING.md with conventional-commits spec + PR template (matches phenoShared/FocalPoint pattern). Replace the 5-line CHANGELOG.md placeholder with a Keep-a-Changelog 1.1.0 template (Unreleased + 0.1.0 entries). Adds ~25 hygiene points (current 72 → ~95/100) and is prerequisite for the org-wide template PRs in DAG task #24.

notes: Stack mismatch: DAG L1-14 calls this 'vue+fastapi, local SQLite'; actual repo has zero .vue files, zero .sqlite files, and the only FastAPI surface is localbase-provider/api_server.py. Frontend is Next.js 15.5.15 + React 18, API is Express 4.22, DB is Supabase Postgres (cloud). The DAG adoption plan (FLEET_100TASK_DAG_v2.md:90) lists 'pheno-fastapi-base + pheno-zod-schemas + pheno-pydantic-models' but Express has no pydantic surface and the frontend has no zod dependency. Action item #1 is to correct the DAG before any of the other action items are queued.

Two frontend routers coexist: app/ (App Router, 11 files including app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx, app/actions/api-keys.ts, app/actions/jobs.ts) and pages-2/ (Pages Router, 2 files: index.tsx + marketplace.tsx). pages-2/ looks like an experimental/draft surface and should either be merged or removed in a follow-up.

Block explorer / chain E2E: no docker-compose harness in repo despite README mentioning 'Docker (for local development)'. The Go chain integration tests live in localbase-tests/ but the localbase-chain/x/ directory has no testcontainers or dockertest setup.

Tracked files: 31 directories + 11 root files at HEAD. localbase-frontend has the largest tree (32 entries), followed by localbase-tests (64) and localbase-api (17). The .agileplus/specs/ subtree is the org's spec-kit-equivalent planning surface.
Most recent commit is a CI hygiene fix (Node 18.x → 20.x LTS), consistent with this audit's findings about CI being JS-only and needing the same Node-EOL treatment for the Go and Python runtimes.
